creator: Ralf.vanderEnden@deltares.nl
text:
Hello Oliver,

I checked the codebase for the most recent version of mkvtoolnix (v6.9.1) r=
eleased yesterday and the code hasn't changed, which means the issue is sti=
ll there.
Sorry I linked to the build log of the old version.

Regards,

Ralf

-----Original Message-----
From: Oliver Fromme [mailto:oliver.fromme@secnetix.de]
Sent: dinsdag 22 april 2014 14:29
To: Ralf van der Enden
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/188427: multimedia/mkvtoolnix: Update to 6.8.0

Hello Ralf,

Thank you very much for your input.  It's useful to know that disabling CUR=
L seems to work around the issue.

The build log that you mentioned is based on an outdated version of mkvtool=
nix.  Here's a more recent one based on 6.7.0:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-pkg-fallout/Week-of-Mon-20140414=
/145612.html

However, the current upstream version is 6.8.0.  But I guess the problem is=
 the same.  Unfortunately I'm still at FreeBSD 9 so I can't provide further=
 analysis.

Best regards
   Oliver
